2603.22363.title: Early Discoveries of Algorithmist I: Promise of Provable Algorithm Synthesis at Scale
2603.22363.paper_summary: Designing algorithms with provable guarantees that also work well in practice remains difficult, requiring both mathematical reasoning and careful implementation. Existing approaches that bridge worst-case theory and empirical performance, such as beyond-worst-case analysis and data-driven algorithm selection, typically assume prior distributional knowledge or restrict attention to a fixed pool of algorithms. Recent progress in LLMs suggests a new possibility: provable algorithm synthesis on the fly. To study this, we built Algorithmist, an autonomous researcher agent on top of GitHub Copilot that runs a multi-agent research-and-review loop, with separate stages for idea generation, algorithm and proof development, proof-guided implementation, and review of proofs, code, and their alignment. We evaluate Algorithmist on research-level tasks in private data analysis and clustering. When asked to design practical methods that jointly satisfy privacy, approximation, and interpretability requirements, it produced provably sound and empirically effective algorithms, together with research-style writeups and audited implementations. It also found improved algorithms in some settings, explained principled barriers in others, and uncovered a subtle proof bug in prior published work. More broadly, our results suggest a new paradigm in which LLM systems generate research-paper-quality algorithmic artifacts tailored to each dataset and deployment setting. They also point to a proof-first code-synthesis paradigm, in which code is developed alongside a structured natural-language proof intermediate representation and kept aligned with it throughout synthesis.
2603.22363.paper_summary_zh: 設計具有可證明保證且在實踐中表現良好的算法仍然困難，這需要數學推理和仔細的實施。現有的橋接最壞情況理論和實證性能的方法，例如超越最壞情況分析和數據驅動的算法選擇，通常假設先前的分佈知識或將注意力限制在固定的算法池中。近期在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展暗示了一種新可能性：即時可證明的算法合成。為了研究這一點，我們構建了Algorithmist，一個基於GitHub Copilot的自主研究代理，運行多代理的研究和審查循環，並設有分別的階段進行創意生成、算法和證明開發、證明引導的實施，以及對證明、代碼及其對齊的審查。我們在私有數據分析和聚類的研究級任務上評估了Algorithmist。當要求設計同時滿足隱私、近似和可解釋性要求的實用方法時，它產生了可證明的合理且在實證上有效的算法，並附上研究風格的寫作和經過審核的實施。在某些情況下，它還找到了改進的算法，解釋了其他情況中的原則性障礙，並揭示了先前已發表工作中的一個微妙證明錯誤。更廣泛地說，我們的結果暗示了一種新範式，其中大型語言模型系統生成針對每個數據集和部署設置量身定制的研究論文質量的算法工件。它們還指向一種以證明為先的代碼合成範式，其中代碼與結構化的自然語言證明中間表示一起開發，並在整個合成過程中保持對齊。
2603.22363.author: Janardhan Kulkarni et.al.
